source_note: Verified vs The5ers help center (help.the5ers.com) + 2026 reviews. High Stakes 2-step: targets 8%/5%, max loss 10% ABSOLUTE/static from initial balance, daily loss 5% from previous day's higher of closing equity/balance at 00:00 server, min 3 PROFITABLE trading days, no time limit (30-day inactivity expiry). News trading, HFT, hedging, arbitrage, copy trading PROHIBITED. USA traders restricted. Fee ~USD for 100K tier - verify exact at checkout.
size_tiers_note: Only the 100K fee ($595) is verified. Other sizes ESTIMATED from typical CFD prop-firm price ratios (needs per-size verification at the firm's checkout).
